description: Seamless tileable wall texture of buckled and warped corrugated metal paneling from an abandoned industrial facility. Visible panel seams and rivets, dented and stress-warped surface. Rust streaking in orange-brown and dark umber, oxidation blotches, scratched and flaking faded olive-drab and dull gray paint. Irregular organic vines with leaves creeping across roughly 30-40% of the surface in muted moss green, olive, and dark green tones, with some dried brown vine sections, leaving 60-70% of the metal clearly visible. No props, pipework, signage, or characters. Flat neutral lighting, no baked directional shadows.
style: photoreal-leaning painted texture, derelict industrial facility aesthetic, desaturated cool grays and browns with rust accents and muted organic greens, mid-to-dark moody value range, no bright saturated colors, seamless tiling on all edges, no repeating obvious motif
